description_long: This chair features a striking and unconventional design, with a metallic frame and a bold red seat and backrest. The backrest is tall and shield-like, adorned with a lattice pattern at the top and accented by metallic studs. Four dark, coiled, tentacle-like structures extend from the back, giving the chair a dramatic and almost creature-like appearance. The seat and backrest are padded and upholstered in a glossy red material, providing both comfort and visual contrast to the metallic frame. The legs are angular and robust, suggesting stability, while the armrests are integrated into the frame and partially encircled by the coiled elements. This chair would serve as a statement piece in an urban setting, blending functionality with avant-garde aesthetics.
description: A bold, metallic chair with a tall red backrest, padded seat, and four dark, coiled extensions on the back, combining comfort with a dramatic, avant-garde design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall, red padded backrest with a lattice pattern at the top and four coiled extensions emerging from behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the seat, the angular metallic legs, and the spiral, tentacle-like structures wrapping around the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full extent of the four coiled extensions and the solid metallic back, with no visible seat or padding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the seat profile, metallic frame, and the dramatic coiled extensions.
